question.text: According to the SEBI circular dated July 24, 2020, what were depositories advised to record?

answer.text: All types of encumbrances specified under Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011

explanation.text: **The Logic:** SEBI vide its circular dated July 24, 2020 advised the Depositories to record all types of encumbrances specified under Regulation 28(3) of SEBI (SAST) Regulations, 2011. **The Trap:** Option (b) covers only two types of encumbrances, but the circular covers ALL types. **Cross-Exam Context:** SEBI circulars on encumbrance recording are relevant for NISM Series VI and Series IX. **Distributor's Pro-Tip:** The comprehensive recording of all encumbrances improves market transparency and helps investors assess promoter risk.
